findings.line: No title. No endearment. Only her name.
findings.reason: Pattern 8 mundane-reveal chain; the negated scaffolding delays the only meaningful payload.

findings.line: No dramatic collapse. The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the spent strength hit all at once.
findings.deletionTest: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the spent strength hit all at once.
findings.reason: Pattern 2 fragment pivot; the first fragment is dead-weight staging before the real event.
findings.suggestedFix: The moment she stopped feeding the sails, the spent strength hit all at once.

clusterFlags: Jaina analytical narration shows 2+ body-part / inanimate-subject hits across lines 5, 83, and 209.
Sylvanas road section stacks 2 hits across lines 315 and 323.

secondSweepP5P6.notes: The dedicated inanimate-subject reread added line 209 and line 323.

findings.line: Now the yard opened in front of her and dwarven hands were coming fast over the trampled snow.
findings.subject: dwarven hands
findings.realAgent: the dwarves hurrying across the yard
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; the sentence lets hands move in place of the dwarves who are actually arriving.
findings.suggestedFix: Now the yard opened in front of her and dwarves were coming fast over the trampled snow.

findings.line: Her fingers wrote it in the air.
findings.subject: Her fingers
findings.realAgent: Jaina tracing the pattern in the air
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part agency; replacing the fingers with Jaina preserves the meaning exactly.
findings.suggestedFix: She wrote it in the air.

findings.line: The sea had a way of eating magic even when it was not trying.
findings.subject: The sea
findings.realAgent: ambient sea conditions draining the sending-stone's magic
findings.reason: Pattern 5 object-wanting/refusing logic via the second-sweep physical-behavior check; the sentence gives the sea intentional resistance instead of naming the drain as mechanics.
findings.suggestedFix: The sea drained magic as a matter of course.

findings.line: The painted prince caught Jaina's eye.
findings.subject: The painted prince
findings.reason: Pattern 8 body-part / object agency; the sign is not acting on her body, she is seeing it.

findings.line: Keeping silent sat badly in her mouth.
findings.subject: Keeping silent
findings.realAgent: Sylvanas feeling the cost of withholding the warning
findings.reason: Pattern 7 absence/state given active bodily pressure; the discomfort belongs to Sylvanas, not to silence as an agent.
findings.suggestedFix: Keeping silent left bitterness in her mouth.
